(2021); ref_diffusion: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (2020); ref_dlbook: Deep Learning (2016); ref_flow: Flow Matching for Generative Modeling (2022); ref_gnn: Relational inductive biases, deep learning, and graph networks (2018); ref_nerf: NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis (2020); ref_transformer: Attention Is All You Need (2017); ref_vae: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes (2013).
